titleEn: Celebrating America’s 250th anniversary with retail activation program for watermelons
titleZh: 美国西瓜零售商推出爱国主题展示计划庆祝建国250周年
summaryZh: Melon 1公司推出美国主题西瓜展示箱计划，在东部和中西部零售点投放超过31.5万个爱国主题展示箱，以庆祝美国建国250周年和独立日。该计划旨在提升西瓜销售，同时强调美国农民家庭和本土农产品价值。零售商反馈积极，认为展示箱能吸引顾客并增强购物体验。文章还提到西瓜生产从佛罗里达转向佐治亚和南卡罗来纳，确保夏季供应。
featuredReason: 尽管该新闻主要聚焦于零售营销和消费者活动，而非智慧畜牧核心技术，但其中提及的供应链管理、季节性生产规划及农民-消费者连接策略，可为智慧畜牧行业在品牌化、数据驱动的零售激活和消费者互动方面提供跨界参考。
contentFull: Celebrating America’s 250th anniversary with retail activation program for watermelons As consumers prepare for Fourth of July celebrations, Melon 1 is helping retailers showcase watermelons through an expanded USA-themed merchandising program designed to drive excitement in the produce department and celebrate the American family farmer. This season, more than 315,000 patriotic Melon 1 watermelon display bins are appearing in partner retail locations across the East Coast and Midwest. The colorful displays are designed to attract shoppers while reinforcing the connection between consumers and the local farmers who grow their high-quality watermelons. Retailers have reported strong feedback on the program, noting that the USA-themed bins help create a compelling in-store presence and encourage shopper engagement during one of the busiest periods of the year. The company believes the USA-focused displays not only help drive sales but also serve as a reminder of the dedication required to bring fresh produce from American farms to family tables. © Melon 1 "We are thrilled that retailers are seeing the impact our colorful bins have on the shopping experience, and our growers are working hard to deliver the best quality watermelons consumers can find. We're proud to be growing right here in the USA, and we love how our bins reflect the hard work of our family farms," says Rachel Syngo, chief marketing officer. As watermelon production transitions from Florida into Georgia and South Carolina, the company remains well-positioned to support retailers through peak summer demand and beyond. Strong crops there are supplying Fourth of July celebrations while helping ensure a steady supply of premium American-grown watermelon throughout the remainder of the summer and throughout the fall. "We know watermelon is a centerpiece of many Fourth of July celebrations," said Trey Miller, chief operating officer. "As family farmers, it's rewarding to know that the fruit we grow will be part of backyard cookouts, family gatherings, and holiday traditions across the country." The USA bin program reflects the company's commitment to supporting both retailers and growers through merchandising programs that create excitement at retail while highlighting the value of American-grown produce. For more information: Rachel SyngoMelon 1 www.melon1.com Saudi Arabia's melon production exceeds 70,500 tons “Berry farming is a labor of passion and dedication” Strong demand supports Kashmir cherry and plum prices New CA facility extends apple and pear storage in South Africa "We're seeing excellent berry size, sweetness and overall quality" First commercial UK Sassy volumes to be harvested in September Celebrating America’s 250th anniversary with retail activation program for watermelons Washington growers monitor cherry orchards after last week’s rain "Last week there wasn't a cyclist in sight at the cherry stall, but this week looks much more promising" Hail causes major losses to Argentina's apple production Saudi Arabia's melon production exceeds 70,500 tons “Berry farming is a labor of passion and dedication” Strong demand supports Kashmir cherry and plum prices New CA facility extends apple and pear storage in South Africa "We're seeing excellent berry size, sweetness and overall quality" First commercial UK Sassy volumes to be harvested in September Celebrating America’s 250th anniversary with retail activation program for watermelons Washington growers monitor cherry orchards after last week’s rain "Last week there wasn't a cyclist in sight at the cherry stall, but this week looks much more promising" Hail causes major losses to Argentina's apple production Fresh India Show 2026 Morocco Tomato Conference 2026 CPMA 2026 Retail Tour Toronto CPMA 2026
translationZh: 随着消费者为7月4日独立日庆祝活动做准备，Melon 1公司正通过一项扩展的美国主题商品展示计划，帮助零售商展示西瓜，旨在为农产品部门注入活力，并庆祝美国农民家庭。本季，超过31.5万个爱国主题的Melon 1西瓜展示箱出现在东海岸和中西部的合作零售点。这些色彩鲜艳的展示箱旨在吸引购物者，同时强化消费者与种植高品质西瓜的当地农民之间的联系。零售商对该计划反馈积极，指出美国主题的展示箱有助于在一年中最繁忙的时期之一营造引人注目的店内氛围，并鼓励购物者参与。该公司认为，以美国为主题的展示不仅能推动销售，还能提醒人们将新鲜农产品从美国农场带到家庭餐桌所需的奉献精神。© Melon 1 “我们很高兴零售商看到了我们色彩缤纷的展示箱对购物体验的影响，我们的种植者正努力提供消费者能找到的最佳品质西瓜。我们为在美国本土种植感到自豪，我们喜欢我们的展示箱反映了家庭农场的辛勤工作，”首席营销官Rachel Syngo说。随着西瓜生产从佛罗里达州转向佐治亚州和南卡罗来纳州，该公司仍处于有利地位，能够在夏季高峰期及之后支持零售商。那里的强劲作物正在为独立日庆祝活动提供供应，同时确保在夏季剩余时间和整个秋季稳定供应优质的美国本土西瓜。“我们知道西瓜是许多独立日庆祝活动的核心，”首席运营官Trey Miller说。“作为家庭农民，知道我们种植的水果将成为全国各地后院烧烤、家庭聚会和节日传统的一部分，这令人欣慰。”美国主题展示箱计划反映了公司通过创造零售兴奋点并强调美国本土农产品价值的商品展示计划，支持零售商和种植者的承诺。更多信息：Rachel Syngo，Melon 1，www.melon1.com。沙特阿拉伯的西瓜产量超过70,500吨。“浆果种植是一项充满激情和奉献的劳动。”强劲需求支撑克什米尔樱桃和李子价格。南非新CA设施延长苹果和梨的储存。“我们看到浆果大小、甜度和整体品质都非常出色。”首批商业英国Sassy品种将于9月收获。庆祝美国建国250周年的西瓜零售激活计划。华盛顿种植者在上周降雨后监测樱桃园。“上周樱桃摊前看不到一个骑自行车的人，但这周看起来更有希望。”冰雹给……造成重大损失。
